quoteFirst: We left the yacht soon after eight o'clock, and started by the
quoteLast: train for the city formerly called Yeddo, but latterly, since the Mikado has resided there, Tokio, or eastern capital of Japan.
title: A Voyage in the 'Sunbeam', Our Home on the Ocean for Eleven Months
author: Brassey, Annie, 1839-1887

title: The First regiment Massachusetts heavy artillery, United States volunteers, in the Spanish-American war of 1898
